games.title: Mina the Hollower
games.reason: Originally announced for Halloween 2025 (2025-10-31) then delayed to 2026-05-29; the stale announced date was ingested and the anti-regression guardrails blocked the forward correction while the real date was still in the future. Pin the corrected date.
